claimText: Starred question (distinguished by an asterisk): Requires an oral answer and hence supplementary questions can follow.
evidenceExcerpt: Starred question (distinguished by an asterisk): Requires an oral answer and hence supplementary questions can follow.

claimText: Unstarred question: Requires a written answer and hence, supplementary questions cannot follow.
evidenceExcerpt: Unstarred question: Requires a written answer and hence, supplementary questions cannot follow.
